content.en:
Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, Doomsday Supreme Venerable said: "However, if you want to really obtain resources, you may be able to go to a place - Time and Space Ruins!"

"Spacetime Ruins?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Let's go, I'll take you over and have a look!"

Doomsday Supreme Venerable took Ye Tian to a ruin, and Shadow Sand Supreme Venerable also followed.

Here, a crack appeared, and the three of them Ultimate Extreme Masters stood in front of the crack.

"Opposite this rift is the Space-Time Ruins, where the space-time is very chaotic, even I don't dare to go in, otherwise it will be easy to not be able to come back. If you stay here for a long time, if you're lucky, you might be able to pull some resources from the ruins of time and space through some ultimate arcane. There are a few more space-time ruin cracks like this, and some Ultimate Supremes have been staying near those space-time ruin cracks. This place is ownerless, if you are interested, stay here, build a dojo, and fish for resources all the time. Doomsday Supreme suggested.

Ye Tian's will probed into the ruins of time and space, and felt the power of the familiar endless space-time line.

At this moment, he completely understood.

The endless space-time line may have been shattered and turned into ruins, but it hasn't really dissipated, and 793 still exists.

And the reason why he couldn't sense it was because his cultivation was low, and second, the endless space-time line had been shattered, so it was naturally difficult to sense it.

The Doomsday Extreme Venerable, they did not break through to the peak of the Ancient Demon Age, and they did not know much about the endless time and space line.

Otherwise, they wouldn't have taken the name Plane Ruins.

"Okay, I'll just build a dojo here!"

Ye Tian said.

Then, Doomsday Exaltation and Shadow Sand Exaltation left.

After these two Ultimate Masters left, Ye Tian began to build a dojo and arranged an astonishing array to envelop this area.

"Although the endless space-time line has been shattered and turned into space-time ruins, there may still be some resources in it, even if it is small, it should be enough for me alone!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Instantly, he broke into the ruins of time and space alone.

Rumble!!!!

The chaotic space-time particles of the space-time ruins impacted his physical body, and ordinary peak Ultimate Extremes couldn't withstand such an impact, and they couldn't stay for a few minutes.

But Ye Tian directly urged the Extreme Dao Ultimate (BIBB) Arcane Time Sword Cover, protecting his body, and allowing those space-time particles to impact his body, they were all resisted.

"Very good, with my strength, there is no problem in persisting in urging the Time Sword Cover for a while, and during this time, I will explore the time and space ruins here and compete to find more resources. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

In the ruins of time and space.

Ye Tian quickly searched for useful resources, but this place was almost a ruin, and there were fragments of time and space everywhere.

But there are a lot of space-time particles here, and when Ye Tian was looking for resources, he frantically absorbed space-time particles to supplement them into his body to strengthen his body.

Rumble!!!!

A massive amount of space-time particles poured into his body, allowing his cultivation to gradually improve.

If you can practice here for countless years, then it will be much easier to break through to the top ultimate supreme supreme.

But he couldn't cultivate here for too long, and after a while he had to leave.

......

"This is a fragment of a special metal material, which is very good, and can be used to refine a powerful weapon!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He put it away and continued his search, and soon after, found a fragment of the treasure.

"It's a fragment of the Ultimate Treasure of the Extreme Dao, and the Ultimate Treasure of the Extreme Path is an extremely precious thing to the Ultimate Ancient Demon, and these treasures have all been shattered!"

Ye Tian could imagine how terrifying that battle would have been at the beginning, it should not have been the battle for the ultimate treasure of the space-time and space-level Extreme Dao, although that battle was also terrifying, it did not shatter the endless space-time line.

Afterwards.

He continued to search, and occasionally found resources that suited him, although it was few, but at least there were!

If you were in a place like the Sea of Dimensions, no matter how much you looked for it, you wouldn't be able to find a resource to improve your cultivation.

"Fortunately, the Doomsday Supreme told me here, otherwise I would have been delayed for at least a long time before I learned about the Fragments of Time and Space. "

Ye Tian muttered.

After a period of time, Ye Tian couldn't hold it anymore, and immediately returned from the space-time ruins, and then used the resources he brought back to improve his strength.

He also refined a weapon by the way, and the grade of the weapon on his body now was too low, and he couldn't show his strength at all.

He was going to refine a weapon suitable for the Ultimate Extreme, at least a pinnacle-level Ultimate Weapon, so that it would be suitable for him to use for a long time.

So, he smelted the fragments of some weapons into it, and easily refined a peak ultimate weapon-level long sword, which could cooperate with himself to perform the ultimate arcane of the extreme path such as the ultimate sword realm.

Time flies, and a long time passes.

The number of Terran's Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters is increasing, and the number of Terran's ordinary Ultimate Realm Masters has reached an extremely terrifying level, and the number of Ultimate Realm Masters of other racial forces is not as good as a fraction of the Terrans.

There are more and more strong people in the human race, and the resources of the Dimension Sea are scarce, just absorbing the energy of heaven and earth is enough to make the Dimension Sea about to collapse.

Whew!!

Doomsday Extreme Venerable, Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable, they came to visit Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, your Dimensional Sea is a bit of a big problem, your Terran Race's Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord has too many Eternal Realm Lords, and even the number of Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords in the Ultimate Land is not as good as your Terran's, the Dimension Sea is too small to withstand so many strong people, and after a long time, the Dimension Sea will inevitably collapse. "

"Yes, countless years ago, we also tried to cultivate a large number of Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, which resulted in the collapse of one side of the Heaven and Earth, and only then did we control the number of Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords in the Ultimate Land, and then we stabilized. "

The two Ultimate Masters persuaded him.

"Doomsday Extreme, Shadow Sand Extreme, you don't need to worry, I have a way!"

Ye Tian said.

Is there a way?

Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable were a little puzzled, but it was not good to continue to ask, anyway, even if the Heaven and Earth of the Dimensional Sea collapsed, it had nothing to do with them, it was Ye Tian's matter.

After the departure of the two Ultimate Extreme Lords, Ye Tian decided to help the Dimension Ascend to the Dimension, if it was raised to a level comparable to the space-time bubble, then it would not be a problem to withstand more Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, or even a large number of Ultimate Extreme Lords.

Of course, with his strength, he naturally can't do this, but if it is a heaven and earth that is slightly lower than the space-time bubble, it will definitely not be a problem to accommodate more than a dozen Ultimate Extreme Masters and a large number of Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords at that time.
